message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl with latest bead updates

Updated bead descriptions for ft-dr6zv integration subtasks:
- Added comprehensive testing requirements to all 10 subtasks
- Created ft-dr6zv.1.7 (FrankenSearch test suite) and ft-dr6zv.2.5
  (agent detection test suite) as final gate beads
- Fixed ft-dr6zv.1.2 cross-references (ft-brc7d → ft-e34d9)
- Expanded ft-dr6zv.1.3 with 5-phase migration strategy
- Added cass coordination notes to ft-dr6zv.1.5
- Added prior art references to ft-dr6zv.2.2
